political_background.summary: Daggubati Purandheshwari has a notable political career, having been elected as an MP three times. She won from Bapatla in 2004 and Visakhapatnam in 2009 as an Indian National Congress candidate. After joining the BJP, she contested and lost from Rajampet in 2014 and Visakhapatnam in 2019. In 2024, she successfully won the Lok Sabha election from Rajahmundry as a BJP candidate.
